name: Coffee
description: Restores 2 teamHealth and 5 deliverySpeed. The only true currency of tech.
flavor: Double espresso. It doesn't fix the sprint. It makes you feel like it might.

name: JIRA Ticket
description: +8 deliverySpeed when used. A pre-written, well-scoped ticket — a rare artifact.
flavor: Estimated: 1 point. Actual: unknown. Status: In Progress, since Q1.

name: Rubber Duck
description: +1 teamHealth, +1 modelQuality. Explain the problem to it. It always understands.
flavor: The duck has heard every architectural debate since 2019. It is unimpressed but supportive.

name: Product Roadmap
description: +2 stakeholderTrust, +5 deliverySpeed. A living document that inspires clarity.
flavor: Subject to change. Has always been subject to change. Will always be subject to change.

name: Prompt Template
description: +3 modelQuality, -1 riskCompliance. A validated, safety-reviewed prompt pattern.
flavor: Engineered through 400 iterations. Handles edge cases. Mostly.

name: KPI Dashboard
description: +2 stakeholderTrust, +1 teamHealth. Real numbers silence most arguments.
flavor: Live data. Unless the tracking is broken. Which it was, last Tuesday.

name: DPA Document
description: -3 riskCompliance. A signed Data Processing Agreement. Legal is temporarily satisfied.
flavor: 87 pages. You have read 4 of them. Legal has read all 87. They are not the same 4.

name: Stakeholder Email
description: +2 stakeholderTrust. A carefully crafted async update. Buys you 24–48 hours.
flavor: Subject: Quick Update. Body: 400 words. Subtext: Please don't escalate.

name: OKR Document
description: +3 stakeholderTrust, +5 deliverySpeed. Aligned objectives create momentary peace.
flavor: Key Results are measurable this quarter. That's already an improvement.

name: Cancel Token
description: +3 teamHealth, +5 deliverySpeed, -1 stakeholderTrust. Skip one meeting. Use wisely.
flavor: This meeting could have been an email. It will now be an email.

name: Tech Debt Bomb
description: +15 deliverySpeed NOW. Holds a 30% daily explosion risk: -5 speed, -2 quality, -1 teamHealth.
flavor: You'll deal with it next sprint. Next sprint is a myth.

name: Stress Ball
description: +2 teamHealth. Squeeze it. It has absorbed the frustration of three sprints.
flavor: Dented on one side from the Q3 scope creep incident. A survivor.

name: Model Card
description: +2 modelQuality, -2 riskCompliance. Formal documentation of model capabilities and limitations. Legal accepts this.
flavor: Intended use, known limitations, eval results. The document that proves you thought about it before shipping.

name: Energy Drink
description: +15 deliverySpeed, -2 teamHealth. Heroic velocity. Brief. The crash is real.
flavor: Third one this week. The engineers can tell. You can tell they can tell. Ship faster.

name: Retro Notes
description: +3 teamHealth, +2 deliverySpeed. The team said what needed saying. You wrote it down. It helped.
flavor: Action items: 4. Resolved action items: 1. Feelings processed: many. Net positive.
